holdings.infoBox: SIMS is an equity ETF with a total of 44 individual holdings. The top holdings are Bloom Energy stock at 7.60%, Generac Holdings at 4.55%, Select Water Solutions at 4.30%, Silicon Laboratories at 4.24%, and ON Semiconductor at 3.99%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR S&P Kensho Intelligent Structures ETF (SIMS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of US-listed companies that focuses on innovative infrastructure. SIMS was launched on Dec 26, 2017 and is issued by State Street.
